eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Yakima, WA; at 10:35 AM on SEP 6, 2019 Effective until 11:35 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test of the Emergency Alert System for Yakima County, Washington.  This system would bring you emergency alerts during an emergency.
